Uses of Package
org.tquadrat.foundation.inifile

Packages that use org.tquadrat.foundation.inifile
Package
Description
org.tquadrat.foundation.inifile
The module INIFile provides an API to Windows-style configuration files, the so called 'INI' files, from the extension '.ini' of these files.
org.tquadrat.foundation.inifile.internal
The implementation classes for INIFile.
  • Classes in org.tquadrat.foundation.inifile used by org.tquadrat.foundation.inifile
    Class
    Description
    INIFile
    The API for the access to Windows-style configuration files.
    INIFile.Entry
    An entry for the INI file.
